author: falcion
description: Play ambience in your vault, assign audio to files through metadata with support of local (from vault) and URLs (Youtube, Soundcloud) versions of audio: works on mobile vaults.

manifest.name: WHISPERER.md

name: WHISPERER.md

releases.author: Falcion
releases.description:
This patch fixes issues #23 and #23 after previous (v1.1.0) release:

- issue #23: local audio player didn't work, now this issue is fixed;
- issue #24: plugin was spamming errors in console when handling opening files (metadata music option), this also fixes issues when meta music didn't work.

> [!Important]
> For commits history behind release, see:
>
> - [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/Falcion/Whisperer.md/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#111-2025-05-14)
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: Falcion
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: Falcion
releases.description:
### Publish first initial release

Initial publish release version of the plugin, with basic required functionality:
- support vault's ambience;
- support file-specific ambiences;

Including support of local audio files (.mp3, .ogg and etc.) and URLs (Soundcloud, Youtube) and etc.

> [!Note]
> Changed plugin to work with styles because of OBSIDIAN's convention upon creating plugins.
releases.name: v1.0.0
